gauge.name: Cal-Sag Channel at Blue Island

impacts.statement: Multiple residences are threatened along Canal Street in Blue Island. Parking lots threatened along Cal-Sag Road in Crestwood.
Canal Street is threatened in Blue Island.
Residences threatened along Fulton Street in Blue Island. Widespread inundation of Waters Edge Golf Club in Worth.
Structures and roadways are threatened at Sycamore Mobile Home Park in Blue Island.

Division Street is threatened in Blue Island. Low-lying portions of Waters Edge Golf Club are inundated in Worth. Backwater casues Stony Creek to threaten a few residential structures in Worth. Backwater causes Stony Creek to threaten 111th Street in Worth.
Fulton Street is threatened in Blue Island.
Parking lots are threatened along Fulton Street in Blue Island.
Industrial property is threatened in Alsip.
Water overtops low-lying banks in Alsip.
Water overtops low-lying banks in Blue Island, Chicago, and McMahon Woods. Backwater causes Stony Creek to overtop low-lying banks in Worth.
USACE and MWRD consider opening of O'Brien Lock to reduce flood impacts, depending on the water level of Lake Michigan.

impactsLowWaters.impact: Low water levels begin to impact shipping interests along the river.

value.label: North American Vertical Datum of 1988
value.description: A fixed reference for elevations determined by geodetic leveling. The datum was derived from a general adjustment of the first-order terrestrial leveling nets of the United States, Canada, and Mexico. In the adjustment, only the height of the primary tidal bench mark, referenced to the International Great Lakes Datum of 1985 (IGLD 85) local mean sea level height value, at Father Point, Rimouski, Quebec, Canada was held fixed, thus providing minimum constraint. NAVD 88 and IGLD 85 are identical. However, NAVD 88 bench mark values are given in Helmert orthometric height units while IGLD 85 values are in dynamic heights. See International Great Lakes Datum of 1985, National Geodetic Vertical Datum of 1929, and geopotential difference. NAVD 88 should not be used as Mean Sea Level.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
